name: DOKITO Healthcare MCP
description: Prompt Opinion-ready healthcare MCP server for Nigerian triage education, drug safety checks, synthetic care options, and care-gap review.

compliance.phiPolicy: No real PHI. Tools are designed for synthetic or de-identified data only.
compliance.dataRetention: No MCP tool data is stored by this endpoint.
compliance.medicalScope: Health education and triage support only. No diagnosis, prescribing, or replacement for clinicians.
